funcbody:
func getBehaviorByMode(mode int) []lo.Tuple2[RecommandBehavior, RecommandBehavior] {
	switch mode {
	case 0:
		return mode0Behaviors
	case 1:
		return mode1Behaviors
	case 2:
		return mode2Behaviors
	case 3:
		return mode3Behaviors
	case 4:
		return mode4Behaviors
	}

	return mode0Behaviors
}
